mapper.select: select user_id, username, personal_signature, header_image_adder, sex, birthday, phone_number, follower_amount, liker_amount, writing_amount, like_amount, collect_amount, message_power, create_time from User where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: update User set username=#{username} where user_id=#{userId}

update User
personal_signature=#{personalSignature}, sex=#{sex}, birthday=#{birthday}, message_power=#{messagePower}, where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: select phone_number from User where user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: update User set password=#{password} where user_id=#{userId}
update User set header_image_adder=#{headerImageAdder} where user_id=#{userId}
